what_it_does: This file is a ledger entry for a JPEG image asset named p-1 in the design-source channel under landing-mockups; it stores YAML frontmatter metadata (id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, source, author session, creation time, and links) plus a short markdown caption.
observations: Ledger record for an image asset rather than code
MIME type is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body caption reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — landing-mockups/p-1.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for a JPEG
Content-addressed blob URI with an explicit hash
Caption explicitly labels it as design ground-truth
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed ledger schema
Markdown body provides a human-readable caption
References assets via image:// and blob:// URIs
concerns: Image dimensions are 0, suggesting extraction failed or was not performed
No links to related design files, pages, or requirements
No alt text or detailed visual description beyond the caption
notes: A provenance stub for a landing-mockup JPEG that identifies the asset and its blob but omits extracted dimensions and relationships.
questions: What visual content does landing-mockups/p-1.jpg actually show?
Why are width and height 0 instead of the actual image dimensions?
What system or user does author_session ch-3mpkjg3r represent?
What does the b2 blob store refer to in this context?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth image asset, which matches; however, the record is incomplete as an image descriptor because width, height, and relationships are missing.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog a landing-page mockup image as an authoritative, reusable piece of design source material within the channel memory ledger.
novelty: The image dimensions are recorded as 0×0 despite being a JPEG, and the asset is referenced by a content-addressed blob URI rather than a plain file path.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata record that preserves the identity, source channel, authoring session, and blob location of a design mockup image for downstream use.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger entry for the design-source JPEG landing-mockups/p-1 with content-addressed blob reference, zero recorded dimensions, and a design ground-truth caption.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to catalog and preserve a landing-page mockup image as authoritative design source material.
